productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Response Team White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the tennis player who cares little about the court and more about the game, the adidas Response Team RG shoe comes in a high end design and provides high performance. UpperSynthetic leather upper for absolute support with no break-inMeshed tongue and inner bootie for breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar for all-day comfortPadded footbed for in-step comfortadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMidsoleMoulded EVA insole with adiPRENE inserts in the heel and adiPRENE+ inserts in the forefoor for an absolutely cushioned ride and enhanced impact protection3D Torsion for torsional stabilityOutsoleTPR outsole created using Adiwear 6 technology for enhanced durability Herringbone grooves in the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
